title: PacBio Q4 2025 Slides: Revenue Growth and Margin Expansion Driven by Human Genomics
text: PacBio's Q4 2025 results showed revenue growth and margin expansion driven by human genomics applications. Consumables revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $21.6 million while instrument revenue increased 11% to $5.7 million in Q4 2025. Non-GAAP gross margin was 40% in Q4 2025 compared to 31% for Q4 2024, showing significant margin improvement. Management highlighted record consumable revenue and over 100% year-over-year growth in shipments to clinically focused accounts. Clinical shipments now represent a mid-teens percentage of total consumable shipments, doubling year-over-year. The company emerged from a challenging 2025 with renewed growth momentum. Key metrics included improved gross margins, strong consumable growth, and expanding clinical adoption of HiFi sequencing across hospitals and diagnostic labs.
